title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at JSW Steel

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at JSW Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
